description: An elven ranger who joined the Adventurer's Guild to hone her skills. Expert marksman and tracker with keen senses.

abilities.name: Aimed Shot
abilities.description: A carefully aimed arrow that deals critical damage

abilities.name: Trap
abilities.description: Places a hidden trap that immobilizes enemies

abilities.name: Mark Prey
abilities.description: Marks an enemy, causing all attacks against them to deal bonus damage

combat_lines: You cannot hide from elven eyes.
Nature shows no mercy to predators.
Stay still... this will be quick.
idle_lines: The wind carries whispers of danger.
These human cities are so... loud.
I miss the forests of my homeland.
My bow has served me for three centuries.
Even stone walls cannot block the call of nature.
The Guild accepts all who prove themselves. Even elves.
